text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! It's so satisfying being able to go
all out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has come to an end. Although she's
undoubtedly improved, she's still pushing herself
to her utmost limit in training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black remains unchanged as she
continues to chase after her equally unchanging
dream.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it's kinda late, but I finally realized
something.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I was in way too much of a rush last year.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I want to make those who watch my races smile. It
might seem like a simple task, but in reality, it
takes a lot of work and effort...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If you want to make people smile, you need to
get their attention... but you need skills to do
that. And in order to get those skills, you need to
work hard.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize that there was an order to how
things are done, so I constantly felt rushed and
anxious.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But after learning all that, I was able to build
myself up steadily and turn everyone's attention
to me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Other people might be able to skip a step or two
in the process, but I had no choice but to carry
out every step from beginning to end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What she says is definitely true. Kitasan Black is
such a down-to-earth Umamusume, and that's
likely why people empathize with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wind suddenly grows stronger. The cold
autumn breeze heralds the approaching end of
summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An autumn full of competitive hearts clashing on
the turf approaches. Hopefully, glory also awaits
us...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The wind is so strong... but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to see things through to the end,
Trainer, no matter what comes my way.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not the only one who will hold out to the very
end.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
As long as the two of us give it our all, Dia and I
will meet again... on the grand stage at the end of
the year!
